description_long: This is a tall, narrow chest of drawers with a rectangular top and six vertically stacked drawers. The drawers are color-coded in three distinct shades: orange for the top two, green for the middle two, and blue for the bottom two, each featuring a round knob handle in a matching or complementary color. The frame and sides of the chest are a solid reddish-brown, giving it a cohesive and bold appearance. The chest stands on four short legs, slightly inset from the corners, providing stability and a subtle elevation from the ground. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and no visible decorative embellishments. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as apartment entryways, garages, or community centers.
description: A tall, narrow chest of drawers with six color-coded drawers (orange, green, blue) and round knob handles, set in a reddish-brown frame. The design is modern and simple, with clean lines and no decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six drawers in orange, green, and blue, each with a round knob handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid reddish-brown panel and the depth of the chest, with drawer knobs slightly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted reddish-brown back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid reddish-brown side and drawer knobs slightly protruding.
